name: Prompt Optimizer
description: Improve any AI prompt instantly. Paste a rough idea and get a scored, improved version with explanations — for chat, agents, system prompts, and image generation.

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.title: Anthropic API Key
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Your Anthropic API key from console.anthropic.com. Used to call Claude for prompt analysis.

tools.name: optimize_prompt
tools.description: Analyzes a rough AI prompt, scores it 1–10, and returns an improved version with explanations.

tools.name: get_history
tools.description: Returns previously optimized prompts from local history, with optional type filter and keyword search.

tools.name: reuse_prompt
tools.description: Retrieves a specific improved prompt from history by ID.

tools.name: get_templates
tools.description: Lists built-in starter prompt templates, filterable by type and category.

tools.name: use_template
tools.description: Returns the full text of a built-in starter template by ID and saves it to history.
